blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,940 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 36".
